mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tiktok_conversion_logs WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM tiktok_conversion_logs WHERE event_id = #{eventId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM tiktok_conversion_logs WHERE status = 'failed' AND retry_count < 3 ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE tiktok_conversion_logs SET status = #{status}, response_code = #{responseCode}, response_message = #{responseMessage}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tiktok_conversion_logs WHERE advertiser_id = #{advertiserId} AND event_type = #{eventType} AND status = 'success'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tiktok_conversion_logs WHERE advertiser_id = #{advertiserId}
